Which of the following sentences demonstrates parallelism?
options_html: She is not and does not intend to run for political office.
She is not running and does not intend to run for political office.
She has not and does not intend to run for political office.
She is not running and do not intend to run for political office.
correct_answer_html: She is not running and does not intend to run for political office.

He took offence at my words.
correct_answer_html: He took offence at my words.

question_html: Submissive : Disobedient :: ?

She will either study medicine or to be a lawyer.
correct_answer_html: She will either study medicine or law.
